name: Journal Downloader
description: Batch download PDFs from journal TOC pages + export TOC to Markdown with full title/DOI/links/abstract. Parsers: NEJM, Nature, Science, Lancet, BMJ, Annals of Internal Medicine. Hybrid abstract fetch: Crossref API first → HTML scrape fallback. v3.10: Annals parser (acpjournals.org/toc/aim) — 56-item current-issue walk, 18 section types, inline TOC summary captured (no fetch needed for short-abstract MD).
